# Manifest of cmake-xray M6 DOT report goldens (AP M6-1.2 Tranche A.2).
#
# Each non-comment, non-blank line names exactly one golden file in this
# directory. tests/validate_dot_reports.py checks that the manifest and the
# directory contents agree, and validates each listed golden against the
# DOT contract.
#
# Coverage per plan-M6-1-2.md "E2E-/Golden-Tests":
#   analyze-compile-db-only.dot         -> not_loaded, no target nodes
#   analyze-file-api-loaded.dot         -> loaded, multiple edges, hub source
#   analyze-file-api-partial.dot        -> partial, external_target node + dashed edge
#   analyze-dot-raw-id-special-chars.dot-> escape contract for raw_id with quote/backslash/newline
#   impact-compile-db-only.dot          -> not_loaded
#   impact-file-api-loaded.dot          -> loaded, multiple edges
#   impact-file-api-partial.dot         -> partial, external_target node + dashed edge
analyze-compile-db-only.dot
analyze-dot-raw-id-special-chars.dot
analyze-file-api-loaded.dot
analyze-file-api-partial.dot
impact-compile-db-only.dot
impact-file-api-loaded.dot
impact-file-api-partial.dot
